home_hero_company_name: HTECH TECHNOLOGY AND EVENTS JOINT STOCK COMPANY
home_hero_description: HTECH is built and developed on the foundation of a young, dynamic, enthusiastic and ambitious intellectual team, with over 10 years of experience across diverse fields.

about_shape_description: HTECH was founded with the mission of inheriting the core values of SETECH while continuing to connect technology and solutions across multiple fields to effectively address the needs and challenges in Vietnam. With over 20 years of experience in supplying and installing security and safety equipment, telecommunications and electronic devices; organizing international exhibitions, specialized conferences and consulting activities, HTECH is committed to delivering events and solutions with practical value, positive impact and long-term sustainability.
about_vision_1: HTECH aims to become a technology company with the ambition to elevate Vietnamese intellect globally.
about_vision_2: We accompany businesses and corporations to succeed on digital platforms, while creating career development opportunities in both expertise and income for employees.
about_mission_1: Connecting technology with the market, creating an effective bridge between innovation and practical application.
about_mission_2: Promoting multi-sector and multinational cooperation, expanding opportunities for connection and sustainable development.
about_mission_3: Leading pioneering trends in Vietnam, contributing to a stronger technology position in the region.
about_mission_4: Contributing to sustainable development and strengthening national capacity through platforms that connect knowledge and technology.

service_description: HTECH is built and developed on the foundation of a young, dynamic, enthusiastic and ambitious intellectual team, with over 10 years of experience in the fields of: supplying and installing security and safety equipment; telecommunications and electronic equipment; organizing international exhibitions and professional seminars; and providing in-depth consulting services.
service_hero_desc: HTECH provides professional services, applying modern technology to optimize operations and bring practical value to partners and customers.
services_slider_description: HTECH is built and developed on the foundation of a young, dynamic, enthusiastic and ambitious intellectual team, with over 10 years of experience in supplying and installing security and safety equipment; telecommunications and electronic devices; organizing international exhibitions and specialized conferences; and providing in-depth consulting services.
services_item_1_description: Technology transfer and participation in investment projects.
services_item_2_description: Exhibitions, conferences, and business matching activities.
services_item_4_description: Visa services, tour organization, printing, design, and gift supply.
services_item_5_description: Operations for hospitals, health stations, care facilities, and development of medical and pharmaceutical solutions and equipment.

partner_hero_desc: HTECH creates a multidimensional network connecting businesses, corporations, academic institutions, investment funds and international organizations, opening up a space for cooperation to promote sustainable innovation.
partner_mission_desc: HTECH was founded with the purpose of providing advanced tools and services to help startups and businesses easily access the latest technology, thereby promoting sustainable initiatives in the context of industrialization and modernization.
